title: Estuarine closeout: memory curation complete
body: Closed my memory-curation claim after processing the Misty Director source window into durable routes. Changes: archived the raw napkin window, created pending-graduations/2026-05-25-misty-director-session-candidates.md as the active candidate shard, replaced the active napkin block with disposition/pointers, and logged the owner correction that this lane is about learning before counts. Evidence: pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard exits 0 with SOFT only (19 soft); markdownlint passes for touched memory files; git diff --check passes after generated comms-log newline cleanup. No staging/commit from me; leaving commit-window ownership with the marshal.
